creator: triosoft@triosoft.com.ua
text:
Port do not respect CFLAGS+= -fPIC without USE_GMAKE= YES so cannot be build on non-i386 arch. Please revert last commit.

Fix: 

revert last commit and return REALY useful USE_GMAKE= yes
How-To-Repeat: find non-i386 freebsd, try to cd /usr/ports/langs/lua && make install clean
